---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(scCustomize)
library(qs)
library(furrr)
library(UpSetR)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(cowplot)
library(proxy)
select = dplyr::select

source("../../scripts/gene_lists.R")
source(here::here("config/paths.R"))
```

```{r}
prefix_dir = "~/hdd/rstudio/snRNA/snrna_cellranger/snrna_seurat_cellbender.0.01_preprocess/"
data_obj = file.path(prefix_dir, "obj_clustered.qs")
out_dir = file.path(prefix_dir, "deg")
script_name = "deg_astro"
out_dir = file.path(out_dir, script_name)
dir.create(out_dir)
res_to_use = "cluster"
assay_to_use = "SCT"
```

```{r}
ct_order = c("Glut-HVC-1", "Glut-HVC-1a", "Glut-HVC-2", 
             "Glut-NC-1", "Glut-NC-2", "Glut-NC-3", "Glut-NC-4",
             "Glut-Nido-1", "Glut-Nido-2", "Glut-Nido-3", 
             "Glut-LMAN-1", "Glut-LMAN-2",
             "Glut-NR-1", "Glut-NR-2", "Glut-NR-3", "Glut-NR-4","Glut-NR-5",
             "Glut-RA", "Glut-Arco-1", "Glut-Arco-2", "Glut-Arco-3", "Glut-Arco-4", "Glut-Arco-5",
             "Glut-Pre-3", "Glut-Pre-2", "Glut-Pre-1",
             "GABA-1-1", "GABA-1-2", "GABA-2-1", "GABA-2-2", "GABA-2-3",
             "GABA-3", "GABA-4-1", "GABA-4-2", 
             "GABA-5-1", "GABA-5-2", 
             "GABA-6", "GABA-7", "GABA-8",
             "GABA-Pre",
             "Astro-1", "Astro-2", "Astro-3", "Epen", 
             "Oligo-1", "Oligo-2", "Oligo-3", "OPC",
             "Micro", "Endo")
```

```{r}
obj = qread(data_obj)
cells = Cells(obj)[!grepl("/", obj$assignment)]
obj = subset(obj, cells=cells)
```

```{r}
table(obj$cluster, obj$position)
```

## Cell type table

```{r}
ct_tab = table(obj$cluster, obj$position)
pos_order = c("hvc", "nc", "lman", "nr", "ra", "arco")
```

## Markers - all

```{r}
clusters_to_test = unique(obj$cluster)
clusters_to_test = grep("Astro", clusters_to_test, value=T, invert=F)

cells = Cells(obj)[obj$cluster %in% clusters_to_test]
obj = subset(obj, cells=cells)
plan(sequential)
obj_agg_pos = AggregateExpression(obj, assay=assay_to_use, group.by=c(res_to_use, "assignment"), return.seurat = T)
Idents(obj_agg_pos) = obj_agg_pos@meta.data[,res_to_use]


obj_agg = AggregateExpression(obj, assay=assay_to_use, group.by=c(res_to_use), return.seurat = F)
obj_agg = log1p(obj_agg[[1]])
obj_agg = as.matrix(obj_agg)
#clusters_to_test = unique(obj_agg_pos$cluster)
#options(future.globals.maxSize = 50 * 1E9)
#plan(multisession, workers = min(length(clusters_to_test), 20))

```

```{r}
assay_to_use = "SCT"
markers_fname = file.path(out_dir, sprintf("marker_genes_cluster_%s.rds", assay_to_use))

redo_markers = T
if (redo_markers) {
  markers_agg = FindAllMarkers(obj_agg_pos, assay=assay_to_use, test.use = "DESeq2", only.pos = F)
  saveRDS(markers_agg, markers_fname)
} else {
  markers_agg = readRDS(markers_fname)
}
```


```{r}
markers_agg$sig = markers_agg$p_val_adj < 0.1
table(markers_agg$cluster, markers_agg$sig)
```

### Dotplots

```{r}
Idents(obj) = obj$cluster
obj_agg_cluster = AggregateExpression(obj, assay=assay_to_use, group.by=c(res_to_use), return.seurat = T)
#obj$cluster = factor(obj$cluster, levels=rev(ct_order))
```

```{r}
# markers_agg = markers_agg %>%
#   mutate(class1 = str_extract(cluster, "([A-Z-a-z]+)-*", group=T)) %>%
#   mutate(class1 = sub("-$", "", class1))
#   # mutate(class1 = case_when(grepl("Glut", cluster) ~ "Glut",
#   #                           grepl("GABA", cluster) ~ "GABA",
#   #                           grepl("Pre", cluster) ~ "Neurogenic",
#   #                           grepl("Astro", cluster) ~ "Astro",
#   #                           grepl("Oligo", cluster) ~ ""
#   #                           TRUE ~ cluster))
```

```{r}
ngenes = 10

markers_agg_select = markers_agg %>%
  filter(!grepl("^LOC", gene)) %>% 
  filter(p_val_adj < 1E-2) %>% 
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0) %>% 
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(ngenes, avg_log2FC) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(gene, .keep_all=T) %>% 
  # mutate(class1 = factor(class1, 
  #                        levels=c("Glut-HVC", "Glut-NC", "Glut-Nido", 
  #                                 "Glut-LMAN", "Glut-NR", "Glut-RA", "Glut-Arco", 
  #                                 "Glut-Pre", "GABA", "GABA-Pre", "Astro", "Epen", "Oligo", "OPC", "Micro", "Endo"))) %>% 
  # mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels=ct_order)) %>% 
  # arrange(cluster) %>%
  select(gene) %>% c() %>% unlist()

names(markers_agg_select) = NULL
markers_agg_mat = GetAssayData(obj_agg_cluster, assay = "SCT", layer = "data") 
markers_agg_mat = markers_agg_mat[markers_agg_select,]

scale_factor_y = .04
scale_factor_x = .075
height = length(markers_agg_select) * scale_factor_y
width = length(ct_order) * scale_factor_x

# hc = hclust(dist(markers_agg_mat, method="correlation"), method = "ward.D")
# 
# markers_agg_select = hc$labels[hc$order]

gg = DotPlot_scCustom(obj, features = markers_agg_select, group.by = "cluster", flip_axes = F, dot.scale=2, dot.min = 0)
gg = gg +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = .5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=6),
        axis.line = element_line(linewidth=.5),
        legend.position="none")
gg
save_plot(file.path(out_dir, str_interp("dotplot_${ngenes}.pdf")), gg, base_height=height, base_width=width)
```

## Heatmap
```{r}
ngenes = 50
markers_agg_select = markers_agg %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(ngenes, abs(avg_log2FC))
  


markers_agg_mat = obj_agg[markers_agg_select$gene,]
markers_agg_mat = t(apply(markers_agg_mat, 1, scale))
height = 15
width = 0.5

max_val = 1.5
cols_cur = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks=c(-1*max_val, 0, max_val), colors = c(scales::muted("blue"), "white", scales::muted("red")))
  
hc = hclust(dist(markers_agg_mat), method = "ward.D")
hm = Heatmap(markers_agg_mat, col = cols_cur,
             cluster_rows = hc,
             #clustering_method_rows = "ward.D",
             show_column_dend = F,
             height = unit(height, "inch"),
             width = unit(width, "inch"))
print(hm)
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap.pdf"), width = width + 4, height = height + 4)
print(hm)
dev.off()

height = 2
width = 0.5

hm = Heatmap(markers_agg_mat, col = cols_cur,
             cluster_rows = hc,
             #clustering_method_rows = "ward.D",
             show_column_dend = F,
             show_row_names = F,
             height = unit(height, "inch"),
             width = unit(width, "inch"))
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_no_genes.pdf"), width = width + 4, height = height + 4)
print(hm)
dev.off()

```
```{r}

markers_agg_select = markers_agg %>%
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.1) %>%
  filter(abs(avg_log2FC) >= 1) 
  

markers_agg_mat = obj_agg[markers_agg_select$gene,]
cnames = colnames(markers_agg_mat)
markers_agg_mat = t(apply(markers_agg_mat, 1, scale))
colnames(markers_agg_mat) = cnames

markers_agg_mat = markers_agg_mat[,c("Astro-1", "Astro-2", "Astro-3")]
markers_agg_mat = na.omit(markers_agg_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(markers_agg_mat), method = "ward.D")

height = 15
width = 0.5

max_val = 4
cols_cur = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks=c(-1*max_val, 0, max_val), colors = c(scales::muted("blue"), "white", scales::muted("red")))
  
hc = hclust(dist(markers_agg_mat), method = "ward.D")
hm = Heatmap(markers_agg_mat, col = cols_cur,
             cluster_rows = hc,
             cluster_columns = F,
             #clustering_method_rows = "ward.D",
             show_column_dend = F,
             height = unit(height, "inch"),
             width = unit(width, "inch"))
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_sig.pdf"), width = width + 4, height = height + 4)
print(hm)
dev.off()



height = 2
width = 0.5

hm = Heatmap(markers_agg_mat, col = cols_cur,
             cluster_rows = hc,
             cluster_columns = F,
             #clustering_method_rows = "ward.D",
             show_column_dend = F,
             show_row_names = F,
             height = unit(height, "inch"),
             width = unit(width, "inch"))
print(hm)
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_sig_no_genes.pdf"), width = width + 4, height = height + 4)
print(hm)
dev.off()


dist_mat = as.matrix(dist(markers_agg_mat))
hc_cut = dynamicTreeCut::cutreeDynamic(hc, cutHeight = 100,  method="hybrid", distM = dist_mat, minClusterSize = 20)
genes_split = split(hc$labels, hc_cut)
table(hc_cut)
```

```{r}

markers_agg = markers_agg %>%
  mutate(avg_log2FC_sign = sign(avg_log2FC))

markers_agg_select = markers_agg %>%
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.1) %>%
  filter(abs(avg_log2FC) >= 1) 
  
markers_agg_select_label = markers_agg_select %>%
  group_by(cluster, avg_log2FC_sign ) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("LOC|nbis", gene)) %>% 
  top_n(5, abs(avg_log2FC)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(gene)


markers_agg_mat = obj_agg[markers_agg_select$gene,]
cnames = colnames(markers_agg_mat)
markers_agg_mat = t(apply(markers_agg_mat, 1, scale))
colnames(markers_agg_mat) = cnames

markers_agg_mat = markers_agg_mat[,c("Astro-1", "Astro-2", "Astro-3")]
markers_agg_mat = na.omit(markers_agg_mat)


hc = hclust(dist(markers_agg_mat), method = "ward.D2")

height = 3
width = 0.5

max_val = 1.5
cols_cur = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks=c(-1*max_val, 0, max_val), colors = c(scales::muted("blue"), "white", scales::muted("red")))
  
markers_agg_select_label_ind = na.omit(match(markers_agg_select_label$gene,
                                             rownames(markers_agg_mat)))

ha = rowAnnotation(foo = anno_mark(at = markers_agg_select_label_ind, 
                                   labels = markers_agg_select_label$gene, 
                                   labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=5), 
                                   lines_gp=gpar(lwd=.5)) )

hm = Heatmap(markers_agg_mat, col = cols_cur,
             
             show_row_names = F,
             cluster_rows = hc,
             cluster_columns = F,
             right_annotation = ha,
             show_column_dend = F,
             column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=6),
             row_dend_gp = gpar(lwd=.5),
             height = unit(height, "inch"),
             width = unit(width, "inch"))
print(hm)
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_sig_label.pdf"), width = width + 4, height = height + 4)
print(hm)
dev.off()



dist_mat = as.matrix(dist(markers_agg_mat))
hc_cut = dynamicTreeCut::cutreeDynamic(hc, method="hybrid", distM = dist_mat, minClusterSize = 20)
table(hc_cut)

hc_cut_df = data.frame(gene = rownames(markers_agg_mat), hc_cut = hc_cut)
markers_agg_select_label = markers_agg_select %>% 
  left_join(hc_cut_df) %>% 
  group_by(hc_cut) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("LOC|nbis", gene)) %>% 
  top_n(4, abs(avg_log2FC)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  distinct(gene)

height = 3
width = 0.5

max_val = 1.5
cols_cur = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks=c(-1*max_val, 0, max_val), colors = c(scales::muted("blue"), "white", scales::muted("red")))
  
markers_agg_select_label_ind = na.omit(match(markers_agg_select_label$gene,
                                             rownames(markers_agg_mat)))

ha = rowAnnotation(foo = anno_mark(at = markers_agg_select_label_ind, 
                                   labels = markers_agg_select_label$gene, 
                                   labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=5), 
                                   lines_gp=gpar(lwd=.5)) )

hm = Heatmap(markers_agg_mat, col = cols_cur,
             show_row_names = F,
             cluster_rows = hc,
             cluster_columns = F,
             right_annotation = ha,
             show_column_dend = F,
             row_dend_gp = gpar(lwd=.5),
             height = unit(height, "inch"),
             width = unit(width, "inch"))
print(hm)
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_sig_label_cluster.pdf"), width = width + 4, height = height + 4)
print(hm)
dev.off()

```

### UMAPs
```{r}
umap_dir = file.path(out_dir, "umaps")
dir.create(umap_dir)
```

```{r}
obj_umap_fname =  file.path(prefix_dir, "reduction_viz", "combined_all_umap_glut", "obj_clustered.qs")
obj_umap = qread(obj_umap_fname)
```

```{r}
reductions_to_use = c(arco="dims10nn30mindist0.4", nido="dims20nn40mindist0.5") 
```

```{r}
genes_to_plot = markers_agg_select_label$gene
assays_to_use = c("SCT", "MAGIC_SCT")
plot_dims = list(arco = c(height = 3, width = 3), nido = c(height = 4, width = 4 ))
point_size_factors = list(arco = 1.5, nido = 1)
walk(names(obj_umap), function(region_cur) {
  obj_cur = obj_umap[[region_cur]]
  reduction_to_use = reductions_to_use[region_cur]
  plot_dim = plot_dims[[region_cur]]
  point_size_factor = point_size_factors[[region_cur]]
  
  walk(assays_to_use, function(assay_to_use) {
    DefaultAssay(obj_cur) = assay_to_use
    walk(genes_to_plot, function(gene_to_plot) {
      # gg = Nebulosa::plot_density(obj_cur, 
      #                             features=gene_to_plot, 
      #                             size = .5 * point_size_factor,
      #                             reduction = reduction_to_use, raster = T) + 
      #   coord_equal() + 
      #   theme_void()
      # save_plot(file.path(umap_dir, 
      #                     str_interp("${region_cur}_${gene_to_plot}_${assay_to_use}_density.pdf")), 
      #           gg, base_height = plot_dim["height"], base_width = plot_dim["width"])
      
      gg = FeaturePlot_scCustom(obj_cur,
                                features=gene_to_plot,
                                reduction=reduction_to_use,
                                raster = T, raster.dpi = c(1024,1024),
                                pt.size=2 * point_size_factor) + 
        coord_equal()  + 
        theme_void()
      save_plot(file.path(umap_dir, 
                          str_interp("${region_cur}_${gene_to_plot}_${assay_to_use}.pdf")),
                gg, base_height = plot_dim["height"], base_width = plot_dim["width"])
    })
  })
})
```

### GO, DEG clusters




```{r}
obj_agg_cluster = AggregateExpression(obj, assay=assay_to_use, group.by=res_to_use, return.seurat = T)
mat = GetAssayData(obj_agg_cluster, assay = assay_to_use, layer = "data")

to_keep = apply(mat, 1, function(x) sum(x>0) >= (ncol(mat) * 1))
mat_expr = mat[to_keep,]
```

```{r}
go_res_fname = file.path(out_dir, "go_res.rds")
redo = T
if (redo) {
  entrezid = bitr(Features(obj), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
  
  go_res = imap(genes_split, function(gene_set, gene_set_name) {
    
    gene_set_cur = entrezid$ENTREZID[match(gene_set, entrezid$SYMBOL)]
    gene_set_cur = gene_set_cur[!is.na(gene_set_cur)]
    
    universe = rownames(mat_expr)
    universe = entrezid$ENTREZID[match(universe, entrezid$SYMBOL)]
    universe = universe[!is.na(universe)]
    
    go_res = enrichGO(gene_set_cur, universe = universe, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, ont = "ALL", maxGSSize = 200 )
    as.data.frame(go_res)
  }) %>% set_names(names(genes_split)) %>% bind_rows(.id="gene_set")
  
  saveRDS(go_res, go_res_fname)
} else {
  go_res = readRDS(go_res_fname)
}
```


## GSEA

```{r}
library(fgsea)
gmt_files = GMT_C5_V7  # bundled in data/gene_lists/

gmt_pathway = gmtPathways(gmt_files)
```

```{r}
markers_agg_split = split(markers_agg, markers_agg$cluster)
cluster = markers_agg_split[[1]]
gse_res_list = map(markers_agg_split, function(cluster) {
  cluster = cluster %>% 
    arrange(-avg_log2FC)
  gene_set = cluster %>% select(avg_log2FC) %>% unlist()
  names(gene_set) = cluster$gene
  #names(gene_set) = entrezid$ENTREZID[match(names(gene_set), entrezid$SYMBOL)]
  gene_set = gene_set[!is.na(gene_set)]
  gene_set = gene_set[!is.na(names(gene_set))]
  gsea_res = fgseaMultilevel(pathways = gmt_pathway,
                             stats = gene_set,
                             minSize=20,
                             maxSize=200)
  
  gsea_res_filt = gsea_res %>% filter(padj<.2) %>% arrange(pval)
  collapsedPathways = collapsePathways(gsea_res_filt, pathways = gmt_pathway, stats = gene_set, pval.threshold = .05)
  gsea_res_ind = gsea_res %>% filter(pathway %in% collapsedPathways$mainPathways) %>%
    arrange(-NES)
  return(list(gsea_res, gsea_res_ind))
})
gse_res = map(gse_res_list, 1) %>% set_names(names(markers_agg_split)) %>% bind_rows(.id="cluster")
gse_res_ind = map(gse_res_list, 2) %>% set_names(names(markers_agg_split)) %>% bind_rows(.id="cluster")
```

```{r}
# markers_agg = markers_agg %>% 
#   mutate(p_val_adj_log10p1 = -1 * log10(p_val_adj + 1E-300))
# markers_agg_split = split(markers_agg, markers_agg$cluster)
# 
# gse_res = map(markers_agg_split, function(cluster) {
#   #cluster = cluster %>% arrange(-p_val_adj_log10p1)
#   #gene_set = cluster %>% select(p_val_adj_log10p1) %>% unlist()
#   cluster = cluster %>% 
#     arrange(-avg_log2FC)
#   gene_set = cluster %>% select(avg_log2FC) %>% unlist()
#   names(gene_set) = cluster$gene
#   names(gene_set) = entrezid$ENTREZID[match(names(gene_set), entrezid$SYMBOL)]
#   gene_set = gene_set[!is.na(gene_set)]
#   gene_set = gene_set[!is.na(names(gene_set))]
#   
#   gse_res = gseGO(gene_set, 
#                   OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
#                   ont = "ALL",
#                   maxGSSize = 250,  
#                   pvalueCutoff = .2,
#                   keyType = "ENTREZID")
#   gse_res_simp = simplify(gse_res)
# 
#   as.data.frame(gse_res_simp)
# }) %>% set_names(names(markers_agg_split)) %>% bind_rows(.id="cluster")
# 
# gse_res = gse_res %>% 
#   mutate(core_enrichment_split = map(core_enrichment, function(x) unlist(str_split(x, "/")))) %>%
#   mutate(core_enrichment_symbol = map(core_enrichment_split, function(x) entrezid$SYMBOL[match(x, entrezid$ENTREZID)])) %>%
#   mutate(core_enrichment_symbol = map_chr(core_enrichment_symbol, paste, collapse=","))
```

```{r}
set_order = c("Astro-1", "Astro-2", "Astro-3")
  gse_res_ind_select = gse_res_ind %>%
    mutate(p.adjust_sign = -1 * log10(padj)) %>%
    mutate(NES_sign = sign(NES)) %>%
    filter(padj<.01) %>% 
    select(pathway, cluster) %>%
    mutate(is_sig = TRUE) #%>% 
    #group_by(cluster, NES_sign) #%>%
    #top_n(5, abs(NES))
  
  gse_res_ind_filt = gse_res %>% 
    # mutate(core_enrichment_split = map(core_enrichment, function(x) unlist(str_split(x, "/")))) %>% 
   # mutate(pathway = Description) %>% 
    filter(pathway %in% gse_res_ind_select$pathway) %>%
    distinct(cluster, pathway, .keep_all=T) %>%
    left_join(gse_res_ind_select) %>%
    mutate(is_sig = if_else(is.na(is_sig), FALSE, is_sig)) %>% 
    mutate(pathway = sub("^GO", "", pathway ),
           pathway = gsub("_", " ", pathway), 
           pathway = tolower(pathway)) %>% 
    mutate(pathway = case_when(
      grepl("establishment of protein", pathway) ~ "protein localization to ER",
      grepl("anaphase promoting complex", pathway) ~ "APC-dependent catabolic process",
       grepl("cell adhesion via plasma", pathway) ~ "cell-cell adhesion",
       grepl("nuclear transcribed", pathway) ~ "nonsense mediated decay",
                              
       grepl("cellular component assembly involved in morphogenesis", pathway) ~ "cellular component assembly in morphogenesis",
                               TRUE ~ pathway))
  
  go_res_mat = gse_res_ind_filt %>% 
    select(cluster, pathway, NES) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = "cluster", values_from = "NES", values_fill = 0) %>%
    column_to_rownames("pathway") %>% as.matrix()
  
  hc_row = hclust(dist(go_res_mat), method="ward.D")
  hc_row_order = hc_row$labels[hc_row$order]
  
  
  gse_res_ind_filt = gse_res_ind_filt %>% 
    mutate(leadingEdge_len = map_int(leadingEdge, length))
  
  gse_res_ind_filt = gse_res_ind_filt %>%
    mutate(pathway = factor(pathway, levels=hc_row_order)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels=set_order)) %>%
    complete(pathway, cluster, fill=list(NES=NA, size=NA, leadingEdge_len = NA))
  
  #size_limits = seq(round(min(gsea_res_ind_filt$size, na.rm=T), -1), round(max(gsea_res_ind_filt$size, na.rm=T), -1), by=50)
  size_limits = seq(round(min(gse_res_ind_filt$leadingEdge_len, na.rm=T), -1), round(max(gse_res_ind_filt$leadingEdge_len, na.rm=T), -1), by=20)
  gg = ggplot(gse_res_ind_filt, aes(cluster, pathway)) + 
    geom_point(shape=21, aes(size=leadingEdge_len, fill=NES, color=is_sig)) + 
    scale_color_manual(values=c(`TRUE`="black", `FALSE`=NA)) + 
    scale_fill_gradient2(low=scales::muted("blue"), high=scales::muted("red")) +
    scale_size_continuous(range=c(.5, 3), breaks=size_limits) + 
    labs(x = "", y ="") + 
    theme_bw() + 
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, vjust=.5, hjust=1, size=6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(hjust=1, size=6),
          axis.ticks = element_line(size=.25),
          panel.border = element_blank()) + 
    coord_fixed()

  ncols = ncol(go_res_mat)
  nrows = nrow(go_res_mat)
  
  scale_factor = .1
  width = ncols * scale_factor
  height = nrows * scale_factor
  gg = egg::set_panel_size(gg, width = unit(width, "in"), height = unit(height, "in"))
  plot(gg)  
  save_plot(file.path(out_dir, sprintf("gse_terms_by_cluster.pdf")), gg, base_height = height + 4, base_width = width + 4)
```
